case_title: PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS VS. JUDEA EDEN et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: GAREN, CLARK SUBSTITUTED FOR WU, SCOTT D. AS ATTORNEY FOR PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS AS TO DEFENDANT EDEN, JUDEA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-03-2011
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-23-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST SCOTT D. WU, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S PRIOR ORDER(S), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-07-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-23-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-21-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS
MINUTE ORDER RE: DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR PUBLICATION OF SUMMONS
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-21-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-21-2011 CONTINUED TO JAN-23-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE NOV-21-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR PUBLICATION OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-21-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
